congrats.body: This embedded app template uses App Bridge interface examples like an additional page in the app nav, as well as an Admin GraphQL mutation demo, to provide a starting point for app development.

adminApi.heading: Admin GraphQL API
adminApi.body: Run a sample mutation chain (productCreate → productVariantsBulkUpdate → metaobjectUpsert) against the merchant's store. Useful as a starting point for building Admin API features.

convex.heading: Convex (browser → Convex action)
convex.body: Direct browser-to-Convex call gated by the Shopify session token. The Convex action verifies the JWT and returns the shop record stored at install time.
convex.noRecord: No shop record yet — install triggers afterAuth hook.

multiplePages.heading: Multiple pages
multiplePages.body: The app template comes with an additional page which demonstrates how to create multiple pages within app navigation using App Bridge.
multiplePages.body2: To create your own page and have it show up in the app navigation, add a page inside app/routes, and a link to it in the <ui-nav-menu> component found in app/routes/app.jsx.
